data.content:
Plan: Move auto-verification into the Simple tab of Agent Dispatch.

Files to change:
1. settings-dispatch-section.tsx - Add verification/onVerificationChange props, render SettingsVerificationSection inside the actions tab content
2. settings-sheet.tsx - Remove standalone SettingsVerificationSection and its separator, pass verification props to SettingsDispatchSection

This is a small, focused UI reorganization with no schema or API changes.
